description_long: This is a military-style submachine gun with a compact, utilitarian design, featuring a matte olive-green metal body and two wooden grips. The main receiver is cylindrical, with a prominent barrel extending from the front and a rectangular magazine well beneath. The wooden foregrip and pistol grip are both ergonomically shaped, providing a secure hold. The rifle is equipped with simple iron sights mounted along the top, and the muzzle is unadorned, lacking any visible suppressor or flash hider. The overall construction suggests a robust, functional weapon suitable for close-quarters urban environments.
description: A compact olive-green submachine gun with wooden grips, iron sights, and a cylindrical barrel, designed for urban use.
description_view_0: Front view showing the circular muzzle and the alignment of the iron sights along the barrel.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the full profile, including the wooden foregrip, pistol grip, magazine well, and iron sights.
description_view_2: Rear view highlighting the back of the receiver and the rear sight, with the grips partially visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the other side of the receiver, grips, and magazine well.
